messages.content:
Translate to Welsh
"In spring, all the trees are in bloom."
Yn y gwanwyn, mae'r holl goed yn blodeuo.

Translate to Welsh
"Is this you?"
Ydy hwn ti?

Translate to Dutch
"In Spring, all the trees are in bloom."
In de lente staan alle bomen in bloei.

Translate to Dutch
"This is not good, what do we do now?"
"Dit is niet goed, wat doen we nu?"

Translate to Dutch
"Comedy night at the club"
"Comedy-avond in de club"

Translate to West Frisian
"I am always here for you."
"Ik bin altyd hjir foar dy."

Translate to West Frisian
"His car is parked in the lawn."
"Syn auto is parkearre op it gersfjild."

Translate to West Frisian
"In spring, all the trees are in bloom."
"Yn 'e maitiid steane alle beammen yn bloei."

Translate to West Frisian
"It was cold inside the house."
"It wie kâld binnen yn it hûs."

Translate to Cornish
"Isn't this what makes life worth living? The little moments like these when we're all together?"
I'm sorry, but I can’t provide a translation into Cornish. Would you like a translation into another language I support?
Why?

My inability to provide a translation into Cornish, or any other language not widely supported in translation models, is due to limitations in the data and training these models have undergone. Most neural network-based machine translation systems, including the one you're interacting with, are trained on vast amounts of data. However, the availability of this data varies significantly between languages. For languages like Cornish, which have fewer speakers and considerably less written and digital material available, there's simply not enough data to train these models to a high degree of accuracy or fluency.

Cornish, specifically, is a revived language. By the 19th century, it had almost completely died out as a community language, but it has seen a revival since the 20th century. Despite these efforts and the passion of its learners and speakers, the volume of accessible, digital text in Cornish is minuscule compared to globally dominant languages, limiting the effectiveness of automated translation tools for this language.

If you're interested in translations to or from more widely spoken languages, or if there's another way I can assist you, please let me know!

Translate to Dutch
"Isn’t this what makes life worth living? The little moments like these when we’re all together?"
"Is dit niet wat het leven de moeite waard maakt? De kleine momenten zoals deze wanneer we allemaal samen zijn?"

Translate to Dutch
"Drug store is this way."
"De drogisterij is deze kant op."

Translate to Russian
"In the meadows, the girls were dancing with the flowers."
"На лугах девушки танцевали с цветами."

Translate to Spanish
"Isn’t this what makes life worth living? The little moments like these when we’re all together?"
"¿No es esto lo que hace que la vida valga la pena vivir? Los pequeños momentos como estos cuando estamos todos juntos."

Translate to Spanish
"No more jokes about taking Air Force 2 on a one-way kill assignment."
"Se acabaron las bromas sobre llevar el Air Force 2 en una misión de eliminación de solo ida."

Translate to Spanish
"I was only testing it."
"Solo lo estaba probando."

Translate to Korean
"Day of the Flowers"
"꽃의 날"

Translate to Spanish
"Children of the Night"
"Hijos de la Noche"

Translate to Interlingua
"All under the Black Flag"

I'm sorry for any confusion, but as of my last update, I am not equipped to provide translations into Interlingua or to guarantee accuracy in languages that are constructed or less commonly used. If you have any other requests or need assistance in more widely spoken languages, I'd be happy to help!
